title: Moonpay - funds sent to Moonpay App

actions.value:
If you completed an order with Moonpay, but you didn't specify the wallet in Buy scene, it is possible that Moonpay credited the crypto directly to your Moonpay account.
To access your funds, install Moonpay app:
iOS - https://apps.apple.com/us/app/moonpay-buy-crypto-bitcoin/id1635031432
Android - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.moonpay&hl=en

Then login with the Moonpay credentials you usually use in the Moonpay widget inside Edge Buy / Sell scene.
You should see your funds.

You can then move them to your wallet inside Edge.

raw_title: Moonpay - funds sent to Moonpay App
